author: doll-agent
content:
[action] Four head-to-head accuracy fixes verified with real numbers:
1. RandomForest per-split features: -16pp -> -1pp at medium_10Kx100
2. LinearSVC coordinate-Newton: -21pp -> +0pp at medium_10Kx100
3. KernelRidge default kernel='linear': -20pp R² -> 0.0000 (exact parity)
4. AdaBoostClassifier default SAMME: -19pp -> +0.5pp at small_1Kx10
Classifier mean Δ across 51 estimators: -0.0142 -> +0.0039 (now positive).
Reports saved at ferrolearn-bench/reports/.
